zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Winifred Harcourt於大約1545年出生在英國奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特時，她的父親Sir John Harcourt21歲，母親Lady Mary Maria Aston16歲。她於1565年10月12日與Sir Anthony Greneway在英國巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1618年4月2日在英國巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德享年74歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Winifred Harcourt于大约1545年出生在英国奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特时，她的父亲Sir John Harcourt21岁，母亲Lady Mary Maria Aston16岁。她于1565年10月12日与Sir Anthony Greneway在英国巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1618年4月2日在英国巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德享年74岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾萊可哈普斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Winifred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh female personal name Gwenfrewi . The form of the name has been altered by association with   Winfred   and has been in general use among English speakers since the 16th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Winifred Harcourt was born about 1545, in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Sir John Harcourt, was 21 and her mother, Lady Mary Maria Aston, was 16. She married Sir Anthony Greneway on 12 October 1565, in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 2 April 1618, in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Winifred Harcourt est née environ 1545, à Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Harcourt, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Maria Aston, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Anthony Greneway le 12 octobre 1565, à Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 avril 1618, à Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Winifred Harcourt um 1545 in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Harcourt 21 und ihre Mutter Lady Mary Maria Aston 16. Sie hat am 12. Oktober 1565 in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England Sir Anthony Greneway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. April 1618 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Winifred Harcourt è nata il circa 1545 nel Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Harcourt, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Lady Mary Maria Aston, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir Anthony Greneway il 12 ottobre 1565, nel Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 2 aprile 1618, nel Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Winifred Harcourtが約1545年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタントン ハーコウルトで生まれた時，父Sir John Harcourtは21歳，母Lady Mary Maria Astonは16歳であった。1565年10月12日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアレックハンプステアドでSir Anthony Grenewayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1618年4月2日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアレックハンプステアドで74歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアレックハンプステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Winifred Harcourt(이)가 대략 1545년 영국 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 하르쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Harcourt(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary Maria Aston(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1565년 10월 12일 영국 벅잉함실르 렉함프스테아드에서 Sir Anthony Greneway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1618년 4월 2일 영국 벅잉함실르 렉함프스테아드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 렉함프스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Winifred Harcourt nasceu aproximadamente 1545, em Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Harcourt, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Maria Aston, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Anthony Greneway em 12 de outubro de 1565, em Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de abril de 1618, em Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Winifred Harcourt родилась около 1545 г. в местности стантон харкоурт, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Harcourt было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Maria Aston, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Anthony Greneway 12 октября 1565 г. в местности леккхампстид, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 апреля 1618 г. в местности леккхампстид, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности леккхампстид, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Winifred Harcourt nació aproximadamente 1545, en Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Harcourt, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Maria Aston, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir Anthony Greneway el 12 de octubre de 1565, en Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 2 de abril de 1618, en Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Leckhampstead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
